title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Morgans, Unknown person #8, Luffy as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Third

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We finally made it to this moment!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With these incredibly slim odds... If he manages to get away from this all-out attack formation...

dialogue.speaker: Morgans
dialogue.text: It'll be unbeliev- able big news!!

dialogue.speaker: Morgans
dialogue.text: Be quiet, morgans!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Throw out any hope you have for a scoop...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're sending tens of thousands of our forces...!! It may look embar- rassing, but it'll quash that one in a million chance!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: even if the one to appear from the mirror...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Was the pirate King Gold Roger himself... He wouldn't be able to get away!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And when they're captured... we'll execute all of them and line their heads up for display.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Record that scene tomorrow!!! It'll serve as a warning!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How vulgar... you don't need to go so far...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Haha! Don't be stupid. This is almost too kind!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's impossible, Father!! We're at our limit!! We'll be done in before we reach the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's throw the cake off and escape al- ready!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't falter now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We may have all come from different places, but at least in the face of death...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We should stay to-gether.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: FAAAA- TheEER RR!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should be able to make it there by 1 am!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but what I'm worried about is the "key" of the mirroro-world, brolee...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he wins the duel, and brolee isn't there, he won't be able get out of the mirroro- world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't think Luffy is the type of man that can take that into account...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What worries me is not knowing if he even knows the meeting <€time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's definitely impossible, what should we do!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That too!?

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 32 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
